# Stardust

> Stardust is an opinionated, AI-driven redesign tool for the web. Point it at any URL and it generates clean, deployable static HTML — brand-faithful by default. Open source under Apache 2.0, built by the AEM team at Adobe.

Stardust ships as a Claude Code plugin. It captures a site's existing brand surface (palette, typography, voice, motifs), resolves a redesign direction, prototypes proposed pages, and emits deployable static HTML. The output runs anywhere static files run — GitHub Pages, any CDN, or AEM Edge Delivery via the open-source stardust:deploy converter.

The pipeline is four commands — `extract → direct → prototype → migrate` — plus a one-shot shortcut `/stardust:uplift <URL>` that produces three differentiated variant redesigns from a single command (one of them with cinematic motion).

## Docs

- [Get started](https://stardust.style/docs/): Install Stardust + impeccable in Claude Code, then walk through the four-step pipeline. Includes the `/stardust:uplift` shortcut.
- [Commands](https://stardust.style/docs/commands/): Reference for every sub-command — uplift, extract, direct, prototype, migrate, plus deploy and diff for shipping to AEM EDS and the prepare-migration addendum.

## Deployment

- [Stardust on AEM Edge Delivery](https://stardust.style/aem/): How Stardust output ships to AEM EDS via stardust:deploy. AEM EDS is the frictionless production destination — manage experiences at scale, edge-served, with AI-friendly markup. Stardust generates the artifact; stardust:deploy converts each section into an authorable EDS block and ships it to AEM, and stardust:diff confirms the build matches the source prototype.

## Code

- [Stardust plugin source (adobe/skills)](https://github.com/adobe/skills/tree/main/plugins/stardust): The Claude Code plugin implementation, all skills (`stardust`, `uplift`, `extract`, `direct`, `prototype`, `migrate`, `prepare-migration`, `deploy`, `diff`).
- [stardust:deploy (adobe/skills)](https://github.com/adobe/skills/tree/main/plugins/stardust/skills/deploy): The open-source bridge that converts Stardust HTML into AEM Edge Delivery experiences — each section becomes one authorable EDS block. Paired with [stardust:diff](https://github.com/adobe/skills/tree/main/plugins/stardust/skills/diff), which reconciles the built page against the source prototype.

## Optional

- [impeccable](https://impeccable.style/): The frontend design framework Stardust is built on. Owns the "how" of design well; Stardust owns the "what" of redesigning existing sites.
- [License — Apache 2.0](https://github.com/adobe/skills/blob/main/LICENSE)
